issue_dialog.execution_workspace_warning: Warning: this sub-issue will no longer use the parent issue workspace{{suffix}}.
issue_dialog.create_failed_default: Failed to create issue. Try again.

issue_detail.toast_cancel_failed_body: Unable to cancel the queued comment
issue_detail.toast_interrupt_requested_body: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.

issue_detail.toast_queued_canceled_body: The queued message was restored to the composer.

issue_detail.toast_feedback_saved_will_local: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local
issue_detail.toast_archive_failed_body: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox

project_workspace.intro: Configure the concrete workspace MSProLtd attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
project_workspace.is_primary_note: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
project_workspace.source_local_path_desc: A local path MSProLtd can use directly.
project_workspace.source_non_git_path_desc: A local folder without git semantics.
project_workspace.source_git_repo_desc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
project_workspace.source_remote_managed_desc: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
project_workspace.field_setup_cmd_hint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
project_workspace.field_cleanup_cmd_hint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
project_workspace.advanced_intro: MSProLtd derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
project_workspace.field_runtime_json_hint: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
project_workspace.commands_intro: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
project_workspace.service_empty_with_runtime: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
project_workspace.service_empty_no_runtime: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
project_workspace.job_empty: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
project_workspace.disabled_hint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
project_workspace.not_found: Workspace not found for this project.
project_workspace.validation_remote_required: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
project_workspace.validation_path_or_repo: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
project_workspace.validation_absolute_path: Local workspace path must be absolute.
project_workspace.validation_invalid_url: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
project_workspace.validation_json_object: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.

inbox.columns_title: Choose which inbox columns stay visible
inbox.mark_all_dialog_body_one: This will mark {{count}} unread item as read.
inbox.mark_all_dialog_body_other: This will mark {{count}} unread items as read.
inbox.empty_search: No inbox items match your search.
inbox.empty_filtered: No inbox items match these filters.

routines.title: Routines
routines.page_subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routines.no_routines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.select_company: Select a company to view routines.
routines.toast_default_agent_body: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routines.toast_created_body_with_agent: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routines.toast_created_body_draft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
routines.toast_update_failed_body: MSProLtd could not update the routine.
routines.toast_run_failed_body: MSProLtd could not start the routine run.
routines.composer_subtitle: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routines.advanced_subtitle: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.policy_coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
routines.policy_always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
routines.policy_skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
routines.policy_skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
routines.policy_enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routines.composer_footer_note: After creation, MSProLtd takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

routine_detail.default_agent_warning: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
routine_detail.secret_save_warning: Save this now. MSProLtd will not show the secret value again.
routine_detail.signing_bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
routine_detail.signing_hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
routine_detail.signing_github_hmac: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
routine_detail.signing_none: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
routine_detail.select_company: Select a company to view routines.
routine_detail.toast_save_failed_body: MSProLtd could not save the routine.
routine_detail.toast_run_failed_body: MSProLtd could not start the routine run.
routine_detail.toast_status_failed_body: MSProLtd could not update the routine.
routine_detail.toast_default_agent_body: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routine_detail.toast_trigger_create_failed_body: MSProLtd could not create the trigger.
routine_detail.toast_trigger_saved_body: The routine cadence update was saved.
routine_detail.toast_trigger_update_failed_body: MSProLtd could not update the trigger.
routine_detail.toast_trigger_delete_failed_body: MSProLtd could not delete the trigger.
routine_detail.toast_secret_rotate_failed_body: MSProLtd could not rotate the webhook secret.

execution_workspace.intro: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that MSProLtd reuses for this issue flow.
execution_workspace.intro_extended: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
execution_workspace.service_empty_with_runtime: No services have been started for this execution workspace yet.
execution_workspace.service_empty_no_runtime: No workspace command config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
execution_workspace.job_empty: No one-shot jobs are configured for this execution workspace yet.
execution_workspace.disabled_hint: Execution workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
execution_workspace.configuration_intro: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
execution_workspace.field_provision_hint: Runs when MSProLtd prepares this execution workspace
execution_workspace.field_teardown_hint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
execution_workspace.runtime_source_override: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
execution_workspace.runtime_source_inherit: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
execution_workspace.runtime_source_none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
execution_workspace.advanced_intro: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
execution_workspace.field_runtime_json_hint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
execution_workspace.no_operations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
execution_workspace.validation_repo_url: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
execution_workspace.validation_json_object: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.

approvals.linked_issues_hint: Linked issues remain open until the requesting agent follows up and closes them.

costs.title: Costs
costs.select_company: Select a company to view costs.
costs.select_dates_hint: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.card_finance_ledger_desc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.card_by_agent_desc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.card_by_project_desc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.card_by_biller_desc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costs.stat_subtitle_net: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.stat_subtitle_estimated: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.stat_subtitle_active_incidents: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.stat_subtitle_pending_approvals: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.empty_no_billable: No billable events in this period.
costs.empty_no_finance_period: No cost events in this period.
costs.empty_finance_long: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
costs.budget_desc_agent: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.budget_desc_project: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.

onboarding_wizard.create_first_agent_subtitle: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
onboarding_wizard.give_task_subtitle: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
onboarding_wizard.description_placeholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...
onboarding_wizard.ready_to_launch_subtitle: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

auth.name: Name
auth.title: Sign in to MSProLtd
auth.signin_subtitle: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

cli_auth.title: Approve MSProLtd CLI access
cli_auth.subtitle: A local MSProLtd CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cli_auth.approved_subtitle: The MSProLtd CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cli_auth.restart_prompt: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cli_auth.signin_required_subtitle: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cli_auth.update_failed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
cli_auth.requires_admin: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

board_claim.title: Claim Board ownership
board_claim.subtitle: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.
board_claim.claimed_subtitle: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
board_claim.signin_required_subtitle: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.

plugins_page.title: Plugin Manager
plugins_page.install_dialog_desc: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
plugins_page.alpha_help: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
plugins_page.examples_empty: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
plugins_page.no_installed_help: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
plugins_page.uninstall_dialog_desc_html: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
plugins_page.error_state_no_message: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.

plugin_page.select_company: Select a company to view this page.
plugin_page.duplicate_route_html: Multiple plugins declare the route {{path}}. Use the plugin-id route until the conflict is resolved.

plugin_settings.no_settings: This plugin does not require any settings.
plugin_settings.card_runtime_desc: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
plugin_settings.no_runtime_diagnostics: Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
plugin_settings.health_after_ready: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.

adapters_page.title: Adapters
adapters_page.install_dialog_desc_html: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
adapters_page.field_local_path_help: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
adapters_page.alpha_note_help: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
adapters_page.no_external_help: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapters_page.remove_dialog_desc_html: Are you sure you want to remove the {{type}} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.{{npmCleanup}} This action cannot be undone.
adapters_page.remove_dialog_npm_cleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.
adapters_page.reinstall_dialog_desc: This will pull the latest version of {{name}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.

instance.heartbeats_subtitle: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instance.disable_all_confirm_one: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
instance.disable_all_confirm_other: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
instance.no_heartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
instance.disable_many_failed: Failed to disable {{failed}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
instance.general_subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instance.language_help: MSPRO Operations is an internal tool. Choose the interface language.
instance.censor_username_help: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instance.shortcuts_help: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instance.backup_help: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
instance.ai_feedback_help: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to MSProLtd Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instance.ai_feedback_no_default: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instance.ai_feedback_deny_desc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instance.ai_feedback_devnote_html: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instance.sign_out_help: Sign out of this MSProLtd instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
instance.experimental_subtitle: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instance.exp_isolated_help: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instance.exp_auto_restart_help: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instance.no_admin: No instance admin exists yet. Run this command in your MSProLtd environment to generate the first admin invite URL:
